/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/StableSolver_clique_main.dir/main.o -o stablesolver_clique   -L/home/etud/Documents/Stage/stablesolver/src/build-clique-Desktop-Debug/algorithms  -L/home/etud/Documents/Stage/stablesolver/src/build-clique-Desktop-Debug  algorithms/libStableSolver_clique_greedy.a algorithms/libStableSolver_clique_milp.a algorithms/libStableSolver_clique_local_search.a -lBoost::program_options -lMathOptSolversCMake::milp libStableSolver_clique.a -lOptimizationTools::utils -lOptimizationTools::containers -lOptimizationTools::graph -lLocalSearchSolver::localsearchsolver
